_comment: 2026-07-03: no-decrease floors for the perf-isolated branch-coverage CI lane, seeded from a full local baseline run of the lane's exact selection (dev Hypothesis profile, -m 'not slow and not performance' -k 'not performance', ffi ignore list; measured global line 96.49%, branch 93.22% = 17364/18626). Floors sit below the measurement because the baseline host had Go/Mojo/Julia backend artefacts built while the CI lane builds Rust only, so polyglot dispatch domains (coupling, experimental, upde, nn, monitor, oscillators, ssgf, adapters, supervisor) carry a wider margin. The __init__.py micro-domain (a handful of branches) is deliberately unfloored: one branch flip swings it by tens of points. Ratchet these floors upward from the first green CI run of the branch-coverage lane; never decrease.
